figures.caption: Figure 3: Analysis on DB15K-Entity. (a) Per-snapshot MRR on new vs. old triples; (b) S0 forgetting curves; (c) MRR–BWT Pareto front; (d) multi-metric radar plot.
Figure 2: Overall framework of MRCKG for continual multimodal knowledge graph reasoning.

Table 1: Dataset statistics for all 9 continual MMKG benchmarks (𝑇 = 5 snapshots). #Ent and #Rel denote cumulative entity/relation counts at each snapshot; #Triples denotes the number of triples used at each snapshot after bridge augmentation, rather than only newly introduced triples (split into Train/Valid/Test at a 3:1:1 ratio).
Table 2: Average MRR and Hits@10 comparison on all nine benchmarks. The best result in each column is shown in bold, and the second best is underlined.
